founder.name: Yuki Tanaka
founder.bio: First-time founder. No public GitHub history, no funding, no network. Building in the open on Twitter.

company.name: Prompture
company.one_liner: Version control and diffing for LLM prompts, with regression tests on outputs.

content.title: Prompts are code, but we version them like sticky notes
content.summary: Sharp problem framing on prompt drift and silent regressions. Specific insight, no product yet.

content.text: Been quietly hacking on prompt versioning for 6 weeks. Early prototype diffs prompts and re-runs eval sets on every change. DM if you want in.
content.author: yukibuilds
